ast.name: error
ast.source: ERR_USER library only accepts BLOBs as input
ast.target: ERR_USER 库仅接受 BLOB 作为输入

ast.name: error
ast.source: ERR_USER "multiple" parameter should be of type "boolean"
ast.target: ERR_USER \"multiple\" 参数应为 \"boolean\" 类型

ast.name: error
ast.source: ERR_USER "quality" parameter should be of type "number"
ast.target: ERR_USER \"quality\" 参数应为 \"number\" 类型

ast.name: error
ast.source: ERR_USER "gifInterval" parameter should be of type "number"
ast.target: ERR_USER \"gifInterval\" 参数应为 \"number\" 类型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Inverts the colors of all HEIC images. Great for reading scanned documents.
ast.target: 反转所有 HEIC 图像的颜色。非常适合阅读扫描文档。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to blend your images. Use "Drop White" for scanned documents, and "Drop Black" to fix iPhone cutouts that imported with black backgrounds.
ast.target: 选择如何混合您的图像。对于扫描文档使用“去除白色”，对于导入时带有黑色背景的 iPhone 抠图使用“去除黑色”。
